title: Capture / Clean Export
description: Choose an output layout and download a PNG directly.
footer: Connector arrows, the cursor, and temporary hover effects are removed to keep the export clean.

showcase.title: Showcase Layout
showcase.description: Export the full website stage with the navigator, iPhone simulator, and annotation panel.

presentation.title: Clean Presentation
presentation.description: Remove the left navigator and connector arrows while keeping the simulator and notes panel. Ideal for README and slides.

phone.title: Phone Only
phone.description: Export just the iPhone simulator frame for standalone feature screenshots.
